summary: Hyunwoo explores the desert to find a hidden dungeon, where he encounters and defeats a Mutant Desert Lizard. After realizing his discovery would make for excellent content, he has his editor, Ellis, publish a video of the fight to build hype for his upcoming livestream. During the subsequent solo raid stream, Hyunwoo demonstrates his combat prowess and prepares to face the dungeon's powerful leader.
key_moments: Hyunwoo locates a hidden desert dungeon and defeats a Mutant Desert Lizard.
Ellis edits and publishes a video of the lizard fight, drawing significant viewer attention to Hyunwoo.
Hyunwoo initiates a solo raid on the dungeon boss during his livestream, activating his 'Master of Combat' skill.
